message:
chore(beads): persist sync-branch=main configuration

Enable sync-branch setting in .beads/config.yaml so that
`bd sync` targets main branch without requiring env vars.

Note: bd sync currently overwrites this file on each run,
reverting the config. This commit restores the setting.
The local beads daemon respects the config value correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -42,7 +42,7 @@
 # This setting persists across clones (unlike database config which is gitignored).
 # Can also use BEADS_SYNC_BRANCH env var for local override.
 # If not set, bd sync will require you to run 'bd config set sync.branch <branch>'.
-# sync-branch: "beads-sync"
+sync-branch: "main"
 
 # Multi-repo configuration (experimental - bd-307)
 # Allows hydrating from multiple repositories and routing writes to the correct JSONL
@@ -59,4 +59,4 @@
 # - linear.url
 # - linear.api-key
 # - github.org
-# - github.repo
+# - github.repo
\ No newline at end of file
